name: @metorial/cults
description: Search, browse, and manage 3D printing designs on the Cults3D marketplace. Query the catalog with filters by category, price, date, trending status, and AI-made flag. Publish new designs and update existing ones with titles, descriptions, tags, images, and file URLs. Track sales and revenue with currency conversion, access order history and download links for purchased models, and retrieve account data including printlists, likes, followers, and engagement metrics. Query the platform's category structure with localized names.
